final:
module dram_cell (
    input wire clk,
    input wire enable,
    input wire we, // write enable
    input wire [7:0] data_in,
    output reg [7:0] data_out
);
    reg [7:0] memory;

    always @(posedge clk) begin
        if (enable) begin
            if (we) begin
                memory <= data_in; // Write data to memory
            end
            data_out <= memory; // Read data from memory
        end
    end
  always @(*) begin
    if (1'b0) begin
    end
  end

endmodule
